title: Index
summary: Defines triples (a,b,c) of Laplacian exponents with a+b+c=N and the elementary moves between neighboring terms.

mathematicalContent.body: Defines triples (a,b,c) of Laplacian exponents with a+b+c=N and the elementary moves between neighboring terms.
